features: JAPAN SAKURA Tone Up Cream: This tone-up cream keeps your skin looking beautiful even without makeup, as it instantly coats skin for a natural and dewy finish.It's perfect for your daily light-weight tone-up makeup, leaving your skin moisturized.
Natural Makeup Base: This tone-up cream works as a lightweight makeup base that helps correct uneven skin tone, creating a smooth canvas for natural makeup that looks fresh all day.
Lightweight Texture: This moisture face primer lightweight and non-greasy formula penetrates your skin quickly without leaving any residue, making it perfect for use all day long.
Where Skincare Meets Makeup: Enhance your skin’s natural glow with the power of JAPAN SAKURA extract, delivering a luminous, dewy finish that lasts all day for a smooth, glow.

How To Use: Apply a thin, even layer across the entire face as the first step of your makeup routine. Use alone for a natural glow or mix with your foundation or cushion for added radiance and hydration.
description: Product description Description: This tone-up cream works as a lightweight makeup base that helps correct uneven skin tone, creating a smooth canvas for natural makeup. The lightweight formula penetrates skin quickly and leaves it soft and smooth. This tone up lazy cream has a non-greasy formula that penetrates skin quickly and leaves no residues.You can use it all day long without feeling heavy or oily on your skin. This toning light cream not only conceals shallow blemishes and evens out your skin tone, but also acts as a makeup primer and a bb cream. It is suitable for all skin types. Specifications: Content: 2*30G Shelf Life: Three years Skin Type: All PACKAGE CONTENT: 1*Tone-Up Cream Directions Apply a thin, even layer across the entire face as the first step of your makeup routine. Use alone for a natural glow or mix with your foundation or cushion for added radiance and hydration. Safety Warning no See more
